calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-14-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Setting For Prove-Up Hearing; Declaration Of Martin B. Greenbaum
Off Calendar Sep-06-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Harry L Jacobs; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 2:28 pm and concluding at 2:38 pm.

Plaintiff ASI Nevada, LLC appearing represented by Stephen Shumlas, Esq. via Zoom video conference.
Defendant All Elements Services Inc. not appearing.

DARIN SMITH is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff and testifies via Zoom video conference.

Plaintiff's counsel presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

Plaintiff's counsel makes oral motion to dismiss Doe Defendants.
The Court GRANTS Defendant's oral motion to dismiss the Doe Defendants.

The matter is submitted.

By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff ASI Nevada, LLC, and against Defendant All Elements Services Inc., as follows:

1. Damages: $35,879.55
2. Prejudgment Interest: $2,732.74

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $38,612.29

Proposed judgment signed and filed.(D505)
